title: Conduct major repair and overhaul of machinery and equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct major repair and overhaul of machinery and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
